details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory is missing. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: Active moltbot/ directory found with code modules (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py contains Clawdbot/Moltbot stubs. These are code/config references, not audit/doc documentation of removal.
